_meta.title: India AQI / Air Pollution Complaint Contact Directory
_meta.purpose: Contacts to report rising AQI / air pollution in an Indian city, organized by authority level.
_meta.how_to_use: 1) Look up the state your city is in under 'state_pollution_control_boards' - this is the primary authority for air quality complaints in India. 2) Also check 'municipal_corporations' for your city if the issue is local (construction dust, garbage burning, road dust). 3) CPCB (national) accepts complaints too, especially via the SAMEER app, and coordinates across states.
important_notes: SPCBs (State Pollution Control Boards), not municipal corporations, are the statutory authority for air pollution complaints under the Air (Prevention & Control of Pollution) Act, 1981.

Many Indian municipal corporations do NOT publish a public complaint email - they use dedicated apps, web portals, or toll-free numbers instead (e.g. MCD311 app, BBMP Sahaaya, BMC's 1916 helpline). Where no email exists, this file says so explicitly instead of fabricating one.

Government email addresses and portals change periodically. Emails below were confirmed live on official .gov.in/.nic.in sites as of the date above, but verify against the linked website if a message bounces.

For states/UTs not individually verified in this file, CPCB maintains a live official directory of all SPCBs/PCCs at https://cpcb.nic.in/spcbs-pccs/ (PDF: 'Directory of State Pollution Control Boards/Pollution Control Committees').

national_bodies.name: Central Pollution Control Board
national_bodies.ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
national_bodies.complaint_app: SAMEER App (Android/iOS) - for air pollution complaints incl. road dust, open burning, DG sets
national_bodies.notes: Apex national body; coordinates all SPCBs and handles inter-state pollution issues.

national_bodies.name: Commission for Air Quality Management in NCR and Adjoining Areas
national_bodies.jurisdiction: Delhi-NCR (Delhi, parts of Haryana, UP, Rajasthan)
national_bodies.notes: Statutory body specifically for Delhi-NCR air quality; escalation point when SPCB/DPCC response is inadequate in NCR.

state_pollution_control_boards.complaint_app: MPCB e-Catalyst App (no general public complaint email published; app/phone is the official channel)

state_pollution_control_boards.verified: partial - toll-free confirmed, email confidence lower; verify on website before relying on it

states_not_individually_verified.note: No public complaint email could be confirmed live in this session for these states/UTs. Do not guess an address - use the official CPCB directory link below, or ask to have a specific one looked up.
states_ut_list: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

municipal_corporations.notes: Handles dust/construction/garbage-burning complaints that affect AQI locally; forward broader AQI complaints to DPCC.
No public complaint email published; helpline 1916 and web portal are the official channels.
No public complaint email published; app/phone are the official channels.
No general public complaint email published (only a separate vigilance/corruption email exists, not for AQI). Use helpline 1913 or the online portal.
No public complaint email published; use helpline or web/app portal.
